name: Skill Finder
author: itz-mune
description: Auto-discovers and installs marketplace skills when a task requires capabilities not yet available.
long_description:
A meta-skill that gives the assistant the ability to search the RAGdoll plugin marketplace and auto-install skills on demand.

When the assistant encounters a task it cannot handle — for example, an unsupported file type, a missing API integration, or any capability gap — it will automatically search the marketplace for a relevant skill, install it, and instruct the user to retry.

**How it works:**
1. Assistant detects it lacks a required capability
2. Calls `search_marketplace` to find relevant skills
3. Calls `install_skill` to download and install the best match
4. Asks the user to re-send their message so the new skill can be used

No configuration required.

changelog.1.1.0: Add style support: search_marketplace now includes styles, new install_and_activate_style tool.
changelog.1.2.0: Fix plugin state lookup: read sidecar modules directly instead of HTTP self-call, preventing marketplace timeouts. Improve tool guidance with mandatory workflow and NEVER-mimic rules.
changelog.1.3.0: Fix install and style-activate also timing out: replaced all remaining HTTP self-calls (install, activate) with direct sidecar module calls.
